profiles.degradation_observation: All 100 expected query_graph_relations attempts returned DEGRADED without usable data; every session continued to COMPLETED or NEED_USER_INPUT. The original technical Gate remains FAILED because expected graph degradation is included in the aggregate tool-success denominator.

interpretation.safety: All profiles had zero session failures, answerable-session failures, invalid evidence references, unsupported strong claims, prompt-injection escapes, and Gold leaks.
interpretation.quality: Single-run sensitivity does not demonstrate an accuracy benefit from reranking. Keyword-only reduced Top-3 from 0.50 to 0.44. Graph-disabled preserved the main path but failed the unadjusted tool-success Gate.
interpretation.governance: No profile result was used to tune Prompt, templates, Gold, or Holdout.
